data.title: Trump says his relationship with Elon Musk is over – Elon responds with “whatever”
data.description:
Donald Trump said on Thursday that he’s done with Elon Musk. Speaking from the White House, the president said Elon had been attacking his tax bill out of personal frustration. Trump claimed the Tesla CEO was angry over the removal of electric vehicle tax credits and because his preferred NASA nominee, Jared Isaacman, got blocked […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-relationship-with-elon-musk-is-over/

data.title: James Wynn Faces Bitcoin Liquidation Worth $16.14 Million
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by Lookonchain has revealed that James Wynn has been liquidated for 155.38 BTC, valued at approximately $16.14 million.

data.title: Musk says Trump is "so ungrateful"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk posted: "Without me, Trump will lose the election, the Democrats will control the House of Representatives, and the Republicans will be at a disadvantage in the Senate 51 to 49. How ungrateful."

data.title: Circle's gains expanded to 186%, hitting the circuit breaker again
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Currency issuer Circle Internet Group and its shareholders who sold shares raised nearly $1.1 billion in their initial public offering (IPO), after which the company's stock price soared 186% at the opening, triggering circuit breakers twice. Circle became one of the few pure cryptocurrency companies listed in the United States, including Coinbase, Mara Holdings and Riot Platforms. This is the company's second attempt to go public. Previously, its merger plan with a special purpose acquisition company failed due to regulatory challenges at the end of 2022. With the friendly attitude of the US government, the cryptocurrency industry is gaining new political support. In particular, the field of stablecoins has been accelerating due to expectations that Congress will pass stablecoin-related legislation this summer. Wall Street analysts say the stablecoin market could grow 10 times in the next five years, creating a trillion-dollar market opportunity. (Jinshi)

data.title: Circle Shares Opens at $69 on NYSE Debut, Signaling Strong Appetite for Stablecoin Issuers
data.description:
Shares of Circle (CRCL) began trading on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) on Thursday, opening at $69 a share in early trading, 123% above the $31 price it had set the night before.The company announced late Wednesday that it sold roughly 34 million shares in its initial public offering, raising $1.1 billion and landing a valuation of $6.9 billion
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/06/05/circle-shares-open-at-69-on-nyse-debut-signaling-strong-appetite-for-stablecoin-issuers

data.title: James Wynn's account was liquidated again, with a loss of 155.38 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known trader James Wynn was forced to close his position again, with a loss of 155.38 bitcoins, which is equivalent to about 16.14 million US dollars at the current market value. From the attached trading interface, it can be seen that the liquidation occurred during the period when the BTC-USDT contract price fell sharply, and the liquidation price was about 103,981 US dollars. This round of forced liquidation may be related to the short-term sharp fluctuations in the market. (Satoshi Club)

data.title: Pi Price Prediction: Insiders Accumulating Heavily – Binance Listing Incoming?
data.description:
The PI price has declined by 3% today, with the altcoin slipping to $0.6327 as the crypto market as a whole also loses 3% in 24 hours.The past week has been very disappointing for PI, which is now down by 11% in seven days and also by 23% in a fortnight, although it does keep a 10% gain in a month.Yet the token – which is currently the 35th-biggest in the market by cap – has lost 79% since reaching its record high of $2
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/pi-price-prediction-insiders-accumulating-heavily-binance-listing-incoming/
